pr.title: Record: 5-expert Hedge Mixer + TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.0745)

output.summary: TTT run augments validation-only adaptation with a GPU Hedge mixer that blends neural logits with n-gram experts via online weight updates during chunked scoring.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Score-first TTT trains only on previously scored validation chunks with AdamW adaptation before reporting validation metrics.
techniques: GPU-vectorized 5-expert Hedge mixer in log-prob space
Online Hedge weight updates per token during TTT
Chunked score-first AdamW adaptation on validation tokens
